briefdescription.para: SHA instance and DMA instance placed in shared memory section so that PartialData buffer inside the SHA instance is accessible by PMC DMA.
This function initializes the PMC DMA and SHA instances.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to PmcDma instance to initialize.
Pointer to SHA instance to initialize.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE - if DMA config lookup, DMA init, or SHA init fails.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the LmsShakeVerifyExample and HssShakeVerifyExample.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the LMS or HSS SHAKE256 signature verification failed.
